name: Spanish
note: Grade of C (2.0) or higher required in all courses. Eight courses beyond Intermediate Spanish II (SPA-225). Elementary Spanish (SPA-115/125), Spanish Review and Preparation (SPA-135), and Intermediate Spanish (SPA-215/225) do not count. SPA-148 may count as one of the eight. One Hispanic literature course (SPA-336 or above) must be taken in the senior year. Up to three courses may be substituted by study abroad.

sections.label: Seven Additional Spanish Courses Beyond SPA-225
sections.description: Seven additional courses in Spanish beyond SPA-225. SPA-148 Spanish Literature in Translation may count as one. One Hispanic literature course (SPA-336+) must be taken senior year.
